title: Sinful Lies
overview: Lisa Evans is married to Carl Evans but engages in multiple affairs with different men. Her deceitful behavior escalates as she tries to manipulate these men into plotting to kill her husband, Carl, to collect insurance money. The storyline delves into the web of lies, betrayal, and dangerous consequences that unfold as Lisa's actions come to light. As the plot thickens, viewers are taken on a suspenseful journey filled with deceit, greed, and the unraveling of dark secrets.
